response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with ~18 years of full-stack work, deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple product companies, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, and demonstrated cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes). Testing culture is a clear strength (TDD, test-runner authorship, testing workshops). Gaps are mostly at the edges of the stack: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Jest/Playwright mention, and Kotlin/Python exposure is thin, but these are readily learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: 18+ years full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, directly matching a required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced; Java exposure appears dated and limited
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not mentioned, though testing fundamentals are clearly strong

key_factors.factor: Depth and length of full-stack TS/Node/React experience
